texto: She smiled. "Of course. You are right. How can I enjoy my happiness when so many suffer?" He kissed her forehead. "Soon all suffering will end." She gazed up at him. "And I will be by your side forever." "Forever and ever and ever." He leaned over and kissed her. And so the adventure begins...
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de MaryLu Tyndall que provoca temas ligados a felicidade. Ao questionar “She smiled. "Of course. You are right. How can I enjoy my happiness when so many suffer?" He kiss…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre felicidade, love-quotes, reflexao, com foco em termino e reflexao.
